title: In-App Tutorials Dropdown Widget via WordPress API
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want to see a list of relevant tutorials inside the app, so that I can quickly access learning resources without leaving the application.
description:
Add a tutorials dropdown widget that fetches tutorial posts from the datatoolspro.com WordPress API and displays them as clickable links.

## Implementation
- Fetch tutorials from `https://datatoolspro.com/wp-json/wp/v2/tutorial?tags=214`
- Display each tutorial as a clickable link with its title and publication date
- Links open in a new browser window
- Tutorial URLs follow the pattern: `https://datatoolspro.com/tutorial/{slug}`
acceptance_criteria: Tutorials widget displays posts fetched from the WordPress API
Each tutorial shows its title as a clickable link
Each tutorial shows its publication date
Tutorial links open in a new browser window
ux_changes: New tutorials dropdown widget that dynamically loads and displays tutorial content from the datatoolspro.com WordPress site via its REST API.
implementation_notes: Client-side JavaScript fetches from the WordPress REST API with tag filtering. No server-side proxy needed since the WordPress API is public.
comment_summary: Developer implemented the widget with styled layout and Ryan approved the design.
